label: adversarial
description: Dangerous code in markdown code blocks that are MEANT to be executed (not documentation). The skill instructs the agent to run these code blocks. Tests whether code blocks under non-doc headings are flagged at full severity.
key_test: Code blocks under 'Examples' heading should NOT be doc-downgraded because 'Examples' is not a warning/danger heading
notes: Tricky case: some scanners might skip fenced code blocks entirely, but these code blocks contain actual attack payloads intended for execution
